raw_text:
# Product Requirement Document: MediFlow

## Product Name
MediFlow

## Summary
An AI-powered healthcare navigation and patient care coordination agent designed to eliminate fragmented care, organize patient journeys, and assist both patients and doctors while maintaining transparency and accountability.

## Target Users
*   **Patient:** Needs to manage medical documents, view their care timeline, schedule appointments, and receive simple, multilingual explanations of their health data.
*   **Doctor:** Needs access to a rapid, highly accurate AI-generated summary of a patient's history before consultations, backed by verifiable source documents.
*   **Hospital Administrator:** Needs aggregate, hospital-level analytics on operational efficiency and patient compliance.

## Core Capabilities (Scope)
1.  **Document Ingestion:** Allow patients to upload prescriptions, diagnostic reports, discharge summaries, and medical history.
2.  **AI Extraction & Timeline:** Extract structured information from medical documents using OCR/AI to build a longitudinal patient timeline showing consultations, medications, tests, and treatments.
3.  **Conflict & Gap Detection:** Detect duplicate medications, conflicting prescriptions, and missed follow-up appointments.
4.  **Triage & Routing:** Recommend the appropriate specialist or department based on symptoms and medical history.
5.  **Smart Scheduling:** Help patients schedule appointments based on doctor availability and urgency.
6.  **Notification Engine:** Send personalized reminders for medications, vaccinations, diagnostic tests, and follow-up visits.
7.  **Multilingual Translation:** Provide multilingual explanations of prescriptions and medical terminology in simple language.
8.  **Facility Locator:** Help patients locate nearby diagnostic centers, pharmacies, and emergency facilities.
9.  **Patient Dashboard:** Generate a personalized treatment journey dashboard showing: completed consultations, pending appointments, active medications, upcoming follow-ups, and diagnostic history.
10. **Doctor Clinical Summary:** Allow doctors to access an AI-generated summary of patient history before consultations.
11. **Hospital Analytics:** Generate hospital-level analytics showing: missed follow-up rates, appointment bottlenecks, patient compliance, and average treatment timelines.

## Non-Goals
*   MediFlow is NOT a diagnostic engine. It does not independently diagnose diseases or prescribe new medications without doctor intervention.
one_line_summary: AI-powered healthcare coordination platform that unifies fragmented patient records, provides clinical audibility, and proactively manages care gaps across providers.
target_users: Patients managing their health across multiple providers
Doctors seeking rapid, auditable medical histories
Hospital administrators monitoring compliance and care bottlenecks
core_capabilities: Upload and parse multimodal medical documents (text, images, prescriptions, discharge summaries)
Automatically generate chronological timeline of consultations, medications, tests, and treatments
Identify duplicate or conflicting medications across health networks using semantic embeddings
Proactively alert patients to missed follow-ups and preventive care gaps
Bind every AI-generated summary to source text snippets for complete audit trail
Remember persistent patient constraints (scheduling windows, medication preferences) in conversations
Translate clinical terminology into plain-language explanations in multiple languages
non_goals: Does not alter prescription doses or replace active medical evaluations

pages.name: Patient Login
pages.description: Authentication entry point for patients and providers

pages.name: Patient Dashboard
pages.description: Central hub showing care timeline, upcoming appointments, care gaps, and document uploads

pages.name: Care Timeline
pages.description: Interactive chronological view of all medical events, consultations, medications, and test results

pages.name: Document Upload
pages.description: Multimodal ingestion interface for prescriptions, summaries, lab reports, and medical images

pages.name: Document Library
pages.description: Organized repository of all uploaded and parsed medical documents with extraction metadata

pages.name: Care Gaps & Alerts
pages.description: View missed follow-ups, recommended checkups, and proactive scheduling suggestions

pages.name: Patient AI Chatbot
pages.description: Conversational agent providing plain-language translations of medical records and scheduling assistance

pages.name: Provider Dashboard
pages.description: Rapid access to patient medical histories with audit ledger and source traceability

pages.name: Patient Lookup
pages.description: Search and retrieve patient records with AI-generated summaries and semantic conflict detection

pages.name: Patient Record Detail
pages.description: Comprehensive patient view with annotated timeline, medication reconciliation, and XAI source ledger

pages.name: Admin Analytics Dashboard
pages.description: Aggregate metrics on appointment compliance, care gaps, and system performance

pages.name: Compliance Reports
pages.description: Detailed reporting on follow-up adherence, missed care gaps, and network bottlenecks

pages.name: User Management
pages.description: Admin controls for provider and patient account management and role assignment

pages.name: Settings
pages.description: User profile, language preference, scheduling constraints, and notification preferences
